choose a throne:

Event: The Hunting Adventure
Event Date: 01/07/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E14
Blazing Arrows Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, fires a fire arrow at a random enemy. The arrow deals 24700 / 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 physical damage and sets the target on fire. The burning enemy takes 16500 / 23500 / 33600 / 48000 / 64000 / 80000 / 100000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 23% / 24% / 25% / 26% / 28% / 31% / 35% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Dodge from the gems
Once in a while, shoots a fire arrow at 2 random enemies. The arrow deals 28800 / 41200 / 58800 / 84000 / 112000 / 140000 / 175000 physical damage and sets the target on fire. The burning enemy takes 24700 / 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 28% / 29% / 30% / 31% / 33% / 36% / 40% for 3 sec. Also, all damage dealt to targets is increased by 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% / 17% / 21% / 25% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Dodge from the gems
Once in a while, shoots an incinerating arrow at 3 random enemies. On hit, the arrow deals 32900 / 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 180000 / 200000 pure damage, increases all damage dealt to the target by 18% / 19% / 20% / 21% / 23% / 26% / 30% for 3 sec, and incinerates the enemy for 3 sec. The enemy takes 16500 / 23500 / 33600 / 48000 / 64000 / 80000 / 100000 pure damage every second for 3 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated target take pure damage equal to 50% / 51% / 52% / 53% / 56% / 60% / 65% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the targets of the ability are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor are reduced by 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 16% / 20% / 25% for 3 sec.
